title: Ettu Thikkum Madha Yana
desc: When his father is found dead, Natesan decides to find the culprits. While investigating, he learns that his father's death is connected to the murder of his childhood friend.

title: Cheran Chozhan Pandian
desc: After being released from jail Cheran, Chozhan, and Pandian are determined to reform, they encounter the corrupt politician Swamy. They befriend Gayathri, Swamy's sister, leading to complications.

title: Jerry
desc: Jerry, a guy with a cynical attitude towards the concept of love, is challenged by his friends to make three women fall in love with him. Jerry takes up the challenge and begins flirting with them.

title: Ashoka
desc: A master plan is hatched to assassinate the nation's prime minister. Then, an honest commando, Ashoka, makes it his mission to save and protect him at all costs.

title: Thiraipada Nagaram
desc: Youngsters in Chennai seek film industry opportunities, renting a supportive house and receiving recommendations from a film production manager, but face disagreements.

title: Roja
desc: Roja, a simple girl from a village in Tamil Nadu, makes desperate efforts to find her husband, Rishi, after he is kidnapped by militants during a secret undercover mission in Jammu and Kashmir.

title: Bharatha Rathana
desc: Nawab, a terrorist, and his men kidnap a foreign delegation that visits India. Captain Bhawani, along with her aides, has to rescue them by any means.

title: Chinna Chinna Kannile
desc: When Raju loses his soft-spoken, loving elder brother Balu in a fight, he gives up his violent ways. However, his life changes for the better when he meets his brother's lookalike, who is a criminal.

title: Niyabagal Thalattum
desc: Abhiram meets Nandini and falls for her. But, he has no clue to her whereabouts. While visiting a family friend's house for a wedding, he realises that the bride-to-be is none other than Nandini.

title: Duet
desc: Two musician brothers, Guna and Siva, end up falling in love with Anjali, a choreographer. However, the brothers have a rift when Siva becomes possessive of Anjali.

title: Rajavum 5 Koojavum
desc: A group of people embark on a journey to Sri Lanka, but they are confronted with numerous problems over the course of their journey. Soon, they start to question the purpose of their travel.

title: Pandiyan
desc: Pandiyan, a police officer, is enraged when his sister's husband dies. In order to find and catch the culprits, he goes undercover

title: Majaa
desc: Aadhi and Mathi, along with their father, go to a village and help a retired officer pay off his debts to a landlord. Soon, Mathi forcibly marries the landlord's daughter to teach him a lesson.

title: Naam
desc: A dreaded terrorist's attempt at fleeing the country forever is foiled by the police and his brother is killed in the shootout. He then employs four out-of-work youths to hijack a plane.

title: Aaranyam
desc: Aravind, a young robber, falls in love with Divya who is one of his victims. But her father, a police officer, is against their relationship, so they both elope into a dense forest and live together.

title: Devi
desc: Devi, a Nagini from the Nagaloka, performs a special pooja on an eclipse day but is distracted by Tantra, an evil Naga punished by Nagdeva.

title: Dharmathin Thalaivan
desc: When Raju loses his soft-spoken, loving elder brother Balu in a fight, he gives up his violent ways. However, his life changes for the better when he meets his brother's lookalike, who is a criminal.
